# CDSS Pediatric Clinical Decision Support System

## Overview
Open-source pediatric clinical decision support system running entirely in the browser via SMART on FHIR standard. Deployed on GitHub Pages with zero backend.

## Features
- SMART on FHIR connectivity (EHR Launch + Standalone)
- AI-powered risk alerting (rule engine + ONNX ML)
- Closed-loop decision workflow
- Clinical dashboard with D3 trend charts
- Patient education content system
- PDF report generation

## Technical
- Astro 5 SSG + Svelte 5 islands
- IndexedDB (Dexie.js) for client-side storage
- ONNX Runtime Web for ML inference
- Web Workers for computation offloading

## URL
https://yao.care/smart-pedi-cds/

## Source
https://github.com/yaocare/smart-pedi-cds
